TC-008 site complexity is properly reflected in bid structure: civil/earthwork line items explicitly reference slope retention and stream setback grading in Constructora del Cabo's bid. Both bidders acknowledge site complexity. Ofelia's recommendation correctly goes beyond price — track record with hotel projects in Los Cabos is the differentiating factor.
